notes: Discontinued: no longer listed on spider-farmer.com or spiderfarmer.eu (EU site shows second-hand units only); superseded by SF-Humidifier5. No smart/WiFi/Bluetooth features. 4 mist levels (270–450 ml/h per official manual). Humidity setpoint 35–95% in 5% increments. Runtime 14h at max output (450 ml/h); ~22h at min (270 ml/h), calculated from confirmed tank/output specs. Probe cable 3.6 m. Can be externally power-cycled by any smart outlet controller. Amazon.de listing (B0BWDMDZ7X) still active as of research date.
